ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "hood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "hood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the neighborhood */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Primary mode of transmission */,
  "incubation_period" TEXT /* Typical incubation period of the disease */,
  "mortality_rate" TEXT /* Mortality rate of the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "person_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the person state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the person state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "hood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "untouched" INTEGER /* Number of people in the untouched state */,
  "infected" INTEGER /* Number of people in the infected state */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of people in the recovered state */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Number of people in the deceased state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood on the given date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate of the neighborhood on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_hood_id FOREIGN KEY ("hood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("hood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection entry */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data collection entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_entries_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_entries_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the report entry */,
  "entry_text" TEXT /* Text of the report entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_entries_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
